privileged_info_summary: The environment uses the real-world Bologna Acosta traffic scenario from the Eclipse SUMO iTETRIS project. By inspecting the setup scripts and running the dynamic target edge selection command on the network file, it is confirmed that the edge ID deterministically selected for removal is '118'. The working directory is /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta. The agent must successfully create the new network (acosta_oneway.net.xml), recalculate routes (acosta_oneway.rou.xml), and update the config (run_oneway.sumocfg) before outputting the simulation results to tripinfos_oneway.xml.
